name: grep-excel 0.7.1
cmd: cd /tmp/bench && ./grep_excel bench.csv depts.xlsx -x "SELECT d.DeptName, COUNT(*) FROM bench.bench b JOIN depts.Sheet1 d ON b.Dept = d.Dept GROUP BY d.DeptName" -f simple

name: dsq 0.23.0
cmd: cd /tmp/bench && ./dsq bench.csv depts.xlsx "SELECT d.DeptName, COUNT(*) FROM {0} b JOIN {1} d ON b.Dept = d.Dept GROUP BY d.DeptName"
